title: Object Types, Interfaces, Aliases, and Structural Compatibility · Inference Brief: Readonly Depth
summary: Design public service records that evolve without silently accepting misspelled, mutable, or incompatible fields. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts readonly depth increment in an evolvable service-record contract library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish readonly property, readonly collection, const assertion, and deep immutable domain policy.
Explain fresh object literal checks and preserve validation after values pass through variables or spreads.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
